attributes.action: Remove the cap on Solar Panels
attributes.additional_details: The public has invested in solar panels with the encouragement of the government to do so. Those individuals then find their return from the National Grid when the electricity is received is often capped for three years.Life the cap and provide a fair return on their considerable investment.
attributes.background: Remove the cap on Solar Panels, preventing full capitalisation of the asset and provide additional electricity to the National Grid

rejection.details: We do not know which cap you are referring to - please resubmit making what you are asking for clearer in the text so others may understand better what you are asking them to sign.
